steps.title: Read the survival pattern
steps.content: Type A flies have DptA silenced but DptB active, and they show high survival against A. sicerae. Type B and type AB flies have DptB silenced, and their survival is low. Survival therefore tracks DptB activity.

steps.title: Reject broader claims
steps.content: A reverses the pattern by crediting DptA. B claims DptA protects against multiple species, which the text and graph do not show. D depends on both genes being active together, but that condition is not shown in the graph.

steps.title: Draw the species link
steps.content: Because DptB is linked to survival against A. sicerae but not to resistance against P. rettgeri, the evidence supports a specific defense against A. sicerae. The answer is C.
